Concept.title: SavedDesignConcept
Concept.description: A saved interior design and layout concept configuration.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user who owns this concept.

title.description: The custom title chosen for this design iteration.

createdAt.description: The date-time ISO string representing when this concept was modified or created.

userInput.description: The comprehensive user onboarding inputs including budget, lifestyle priorities and style preferences.

aiResponse.description: The custom spatial layouts, 3D room placements, material suitability index, and compliance checks.

conceptNotes.description: System or user notes about this layout iteration.

concepts/{conceptId}.description: Store individual design layouts, budget matrices, and clearance guidelines per user.
